ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., neural network, decision tree) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags associated with the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter (e.g., learning rate, batch size) */,
  "hyperparameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the hyperparameter (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_data" (
  "training_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training dataset */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that the training dataset belongs to */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the training dataset in MB */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the training dataset (e.g., image, text) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training dataset */,
  "data_url" TEXT /* URL of the training dataset */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the training dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "evaluation_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that the evaluation metric belongs to */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number */,
  "train_loss" REAL /* Training loss */,
  "valid_loss" REAL /* Validation loss */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1-score */,
  "auc" REAL /* AUC */,
  "mean_squared_error" REAL /* Mean Squared Error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, contributor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that the experiment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment was last updated */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., pending, running, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_models" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_deployment_history" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that was deployed */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was deployed */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model that was deployed */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the model was deployed (e.g., production, staging) */,
  "deployment_status" TEXT /* Status of the deployment (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployment_history_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., v1, v2) */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
